_title: The Initiation You Mistook For Destruction
_raw_content: The breaking was never random. The burning was never punishment. Your nervous system was dismantling what no longer matched your next frequency. What felt like falling apart was architecture — the body rebuilding itself from a deeper code. Destruction and creation were never opposites. They were the same breath.
slide_5_revelation: What your mind called destruction, your nervous system called initiation.

slide_6.text: The body doesn't collapse without reason. It dismantles what no longer matches the frequency you're moving toward. The shaking, the grief, the unraveling — it was never broken. It was architecture.

slide_7_cta: Save this for the next time it all falls apart.
caption:
Your nervous system has never once broken down without purpose.

Every collapse was a controlled demolition.
Every fire was clearing ground.

The mind panics because it reads dissolution as death. But the body knows something the mind refuses to accept — that what is falling apart was never meant to hold you at this level.

Breaking and becoming are not two events.
They are one motion.

You were never being destroyed.
You were being decoded.

The initiation doesn't feel like arrival.
It feels like everything ending.

That's how you know it's real.
